title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
